flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at De Anza College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at De Anza College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $12.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at De Anza College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at De Anza College are 34% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($56.6k vs $42.2k).
